summary: Completed comprehensive testing of chess app game over modal functionality. All backend APIs working correctly, game over modal displays properly with CTA message, Play Again button functions correctly for players vs spectators.
passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (POST /api/room/create, GET /api/room/{roomId}) working correctly
Game state returns isGameOver and status fields properly
Home page loads and game creation works
Game over modal appears correctly on checkmate with data-testid='game-over-modal'
Game over headline shows 'Checkmate' text with data-testid='game-over-headline'
CTA section appears with 400ms delay and contains correct text 'This app was vibe-coded in a few hours'
CTA link has correct href='https://app.emergent.sh/register?ref=timo990308' and target='_blank'
Play Again button (data-testid='play-again-button') shows for players but NOT for spectators
Play Again button functionality works - resets the game correctly
Modal has proper dimmed backdrop overlay with bg-black/40 and backdrop-blur
Chat tab, moves tab, volume control, and room ID badge all working
Board colors are brown/cream as required
Username modal and room joining functionality works correctly
